conclusion: E4 proved that network-state release can repeatedly gate controlled interpreter cycles. Each cycle waited for branch Raw source hash release, opened a gate, ran the network-resident multi-capsule interpreter, emitted NETWORK_LANGUAGE_PULSE, and wrote cycle plus loop state back to the remote receiver.
truth_boundary: E4 proves repeated trigger-to-interpreter coupling under a controlled executor. It does not prove the network executes the interpreter loop by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, digital life, or digital supercomputing.
